text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Did you get enough sleep last night?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Here, let me have a better look at you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. The bags under your eyes are slightly
fainter than the other day. Good. That makes me
feel a little better.
choice_data_list: (I'm glad to hear that, but she's—)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know that face. You think I'm worrying too much
again, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, whose fault do you think it is that I'm
worrying so much in the first place? Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I'm off. It's time to prove how
effective the equation we created is.
